name: Fish Tycoon Fix Patcher
description: Repairs the Crimson Comet cure and optionally gives the Unknown Chemical three uses with a matching English store description.

settings.name: Crimson Comet 20% curing fix
settings.description: For each eligible diseased fish, roll 0..99 once; values 0..19 enter the original disease-clear and cure-counter block.

settings.name: Unknown Chemical: 3 uses
settings.description: Initializes the Unknown Chemical with three uses instead of one and changes its English store description to 'Contains 3 doses.'

patches.note: Redirects only the broken sub_403240(0) call at VA 0x004204CE to the wrapper at VA 0x00401E11.

patches.expected: CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC
patches.note: Uses verified INT3 alignment padding. Calls the original exclusive-upper-bound RNG helper once with 100 and returns 1 only for 0..19.
Changes the Unknown Chemical branch at VA 0x004210B7 from mov dword ptr [eax+0x2F8],1 to mov dword ptr [eax+0x2F8],3. The original post-use decrement and empty-at-zero logic remain unchanged.
Changes the unique English text 'Contains one dose.' to the equal-length null-terminated text 'Contains 3 doses.' The rest of the store description is unchanged.
Sets the correct PE checksum 0x0006B452 for the Crimson-only output.
Sets the correct PE checksum 0x0006CB53 for the Unknown-Chemical-only output.
Sets the correct PE checksum 0x000675F6 for the default output containing both fixes.
